title: AgentLoop: Starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle | Product Hunt
excerpt: Unlike long-running agent chats, AgentLoop starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle. Set the goal and GUIDELINES.md rubric once; workers build, critics test, and failures become concrete fix notes for the next clean context. Project files carry the memory. Runs stay local, sandboxed, observable, and cancellable from a live dashboard, with ChatGPT control through MCP. Polish mode can continue beyond PASS until the critic says SHIP. Open source and zero-dependency Node.js.

Runs stay local, sandboxed, observable, and cancellable from a live dashboard, with ChatGPT control through MCP. Polish mode can continue beyond PASS until the critic says SHIP. Open source and zero-dependency Node.js.

blocks.html_en: Unlike long-running agent chats, AgentLoop starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle. Set the goal and GUIDELINES.md rubric once; workers build, critics test, and failures become concrete fix notes for the next clean context. Project files carry the memory. sentences.en: Unlike long-running agent chats, AgentLoop starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle.
sentences.zh: 与长时间运行的代理聊天不同，AgentLoop 每个周期都会启动一个新的 Codex 工作人员和评论家。

sentences.en: Set the goal and GUIDELINES.md rubric once; workers build, critics test, and failures become concrete fix notes for the next clean context.
sentences.zh: 设定目标和 GUIDELINES.md 标题一次；工人建造，批评者测试，失败成为下一个干净环境的具体修复说明。

sentences.en: Runs stay local, sandboxed, observable, and cancellable from a live dashboard, with ChatGPT control through MCP.
sentences.zh: 运行保持在本地、沙箱中、可观察且可从实时仪表板取消，并通过 MCP 进行 ChatGPT 控制。

sentences.en: Polish mode can continue beyond PASS until the critic says SHIP.
sentences.zh: 抛光模式可以在“PASS”之后继续，直到评论家说“SHIP”。

content_html_zh: 与长时间运行的代理聊天不同，AgentLoop 每个周期都会启动一个新的 Codex 工作人员和评论家。 设定目标和 GUIDELINES.md 标题一次；工人建造，批评者测试，失败成为下一个干净环境的具体修复说明。 项目文件承载着内存。 运行保持在本地、沙箱中、可观察且可从实时仪表板取消，并通过 MCP 进行 ChatGPT 控制。 抛光模式可以在“PASS”之后继续，直到评论家说“SHIP”。 开源且零依赖的 Node.js。
